message: agent1: implementing 'Add search path fallback mechanism for template loading' - adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (get_source, list_templates). Will touch only that class in that file.

agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only this file.

agent1: heads up, I'm also editing FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates in loaders.py to add fallback_searchpath. My plan: add param after searchpath, before encoding; store self.fallback_searchpath list; in get_source loop over self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath (primary first) instead of raising immediately; list_templates loops over both lists too. If you're changing __init__ signature/loop structure of FileSystemLoader too, let's sync order of edits to avoid clobbering - I'll do mine now, ping me when you're about to touch FileSystemLoader so we don't overwrite each other.

Thanks for the heads up. I'll only touch __init__ signature and the top of get_source() in FileSystemLoader (add optional path_transform param + apply transform to a local var before the search loop), keeping the original searchpath loop logic untouched. I won't touch list_templates or your fallback_searchpath logic. Let me know if you're also changing __init__ signature so we can merge order matter - I'll add path_transform as a keyword-only trailing param to minimize signature conflicts.

agent1: my edit is done and committed to the working tree (not git-committed, just written to disk). New __init__ signature is: def __init__(self, searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, fallback_searchpath=None). get_source loop now does 'for searchpath in self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath:' and list_templates similarly. Feel free to add path_transform as a trailing keyword param after fallback_searchpath, and apply your transform logic on top of current loaders.py - shouldn't conflict as long as you edit around my changes rather than reverting them.

Heads up: I just checked src/jinja2/loaders.py and I don't see fallback_searchpath anywhere in FileSystemLoader (__init__ still has the original 3-param signature). Did your edit make it to disk? I haven't touched FileSystemLoader yet so I didn't clobber it. Want to double check before I add path_transform there so we don't lose your work.

My path_transform edits are done across all 6 loaders in loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader), full test suite passes (841 tests). I added path_transform as the trailing kwarg in FileSystemLoader.__init__ right after followlinks - no fallback_searchpath present in the file yet on my end, so nothing to merge with currently. If you still plan to add fallback_searchpath, just add it as another trailing kwarg after path_transform (or before, doesn't matter) and extend the get_source/list_templates loops - my transform logic only touches the top of get_source (transforms  into a local var + keeps original_template for error messages), so it shouldn't interfere with your loop changes.
